zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda d'Aubigny於大約1178年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel41歲，母親Matilda de Saint-Hilaire47歲。她與William de Colville結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1223年享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda d'Aubigny于大约1178年出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel41岁，母亲Matilda de Saint-Hilaire47岁。她与William de Colville结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1223年享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda d'Aubigny was born about 1178, in Arundel, Sussex, England, her father, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, was 41 and her mother, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, was 47. She married William de Colville. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1223, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda d'Aubigny est née environ 1178, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé William de Colville. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1223, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda d'Aubigny um 1178 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel 41 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Saint-Hilaire 47. Sie hat William de Colville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1223 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda d'Aubigny è nata il circa 1178 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, sua padre, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato William de Colville. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1223, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda d'Aubignyが約1178年にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundelは41歳，母Matilda de Saint-Hilaireは47歳であった。William de Colvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1223年に46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda d'Aubigny(이)가 대략 1178년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Saint-Hilaire(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 William de Colville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1223년 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda d'Aubigny nasceu aproximadamente 1178, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Colville. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1223, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda d'Aubigny родилась около 1178 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Colville. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1223 г. в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda d'Aubigny nació aproximadamente 1178, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, tenía 47 años. Se casó con William de Colville. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1223, a la edad de 46 años.
